metadata.scope: Monthly base compensation for remote workers in the Philippines, reported in two market contexts: local employer rates (Glassdoor, Payscale, Indeed Philippines) and US employer remote rates (Arc.dev; estimated from BLS OES May 2024 offshore discount bands where direct data is unavailable). Both series are reported with full source citations.
metadata.notes: PHP equivalents calculated at USD/PHP 61.61 (May 17, 2026). Local employer ranges represent 30th–70th percentile of reported compensation from Philippine salary databases. US employer remote ranges reflect what US-based employers pay remote workers in the Philippines, sourced from Arc.dev or estimated at validated offshore discount percentages of the BLS OES May 2024 US domestic median.

bls_reference.source: U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics — Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS), May 2024
bls_reference.note: Annual median wages divided by 12 to derive monthly figures. Used as US domestic benchmark for offshore discount percentage calculations.

local_employer.caveats: Indeed Philippines reports a local average of ₱41,065/month for software engineers at all experience levels. International remote rates reflect a premium for foreign-language proficiency and US-timezone alignment. Manila-based workers typically earn toward the upper range.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Software Engineer Salary in Philippines 2026

local_employer.caveats: Senior engineers with cloud architecture experience (AWS, GCP, Azure) command the upper range. Compensation shows high variance between US-based employer categories.

sources.name: Glassdoor Manila — Senior Software Engineer Salaries

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Senior Software Engineer Salary in Philippines 2026
us_employer_remote.source_note: Reported US employer remote median (54% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Software Developers, SOC 15-1252, $11,090/month) exceeds the expected Philippines senior-level band of 30–40%. Arc.dev figure reported as collected. The Philippines senior SWE market reflects a premium for cloud-architecture specialization and tenure with US product companies. Treat with caution; verify against current Arc.dev data before using in compensation decisions.

local_employer.caveats: Philippine full-stack developers are well-represented in the US startup ecosystem. React/Node.js and Vue/Laravel stacks are most common in posted remote roles.

sources.name: Second Talent — Philippines Developer Rate Card
Indeed Philippines — Full Stack Developer Salaries

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Full-Stack Developer Salary in Philippines 2026

local_employer.caveats: Glassdoor Manila (accessed May 2026) reports a median of ₱80,000/month for DevOps roles across all employer types. International remote rates for senior DevOps engineers with Kubernetes/Terraform experience reach the upper range of this table.

sources.name: Second Talent — DevOps Engineer Rate Card Philippines

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote DevOps Engineer Salary in Philippines 2026 (range midpoint)
us_employer_remote.source_note: Reported US employer remote median (24% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Network and Computer Systems Administrators, SOC 15-1244, $8,067/month) falls partly below the expected Philippines mid-level band of 25–35%. Arc.dev figure reported as collected; midpoint of reported range ($1,500–$2,330/month) used as median. Philippine DevOps market shows high variance; Kubernetes/Terraform specialists may command rates above this range. Treat as directional.

us_baseline_reference.title: Network and Computer Systems Administrators / DevOps

local_employer.caveats: Data analysts specializing in business intelligence tools (Tableau, Power BI) and SQL command a premium at the upper range. Python/R proficiency adds 15–25% in reported ranges.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-2031 — estimated at 28% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: No direct Arc.dev Data Analyst Philippines figure available as of May 2026. Figure estimated at 28% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Operations Research Analysts (SOC 15-2031, $7,608/month), using observed Arc.dev offshore discount band for Philippines mid-level roles (25–35%). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Senior data scientists with 8+ years of experience report annual compensation of ₱1,330,842 (approximately ₱110,904/month, or $1,800/month) per Glassdoor Philippines data. Mid-level ranges are lower.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Data Scientist Salary in Philippines 2026

local_employer.caveats: Automation QA (Playwright, Selenium, Cypress) commands 25–40% premium over manual QA in the Philippine remote market. Mobile testing (iOS Simulator, Android Emulator) adds additional premium.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1253 — estimated at 27% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: No direct Arc.dev QA Engineer Philippines figure available as of May 2026. Figure estimated at 27% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Software Quality Assurance Analysts (SOC 15-1253, $8,551/month), within the expected Philippines mid-level band (25–35%). Treat as directional.

us_baseline_reference.title: Software Quality Assurance Analysts and Testers

local_employer.caveats: SalaryExpert Philippines (accessed May 2026) reports an average AI engineer salary of $39,950/year ($3,329/month) nationally. Second Talent (accessed May 2026) shows mid-level AI engineers charging $25–$55/hour for remote contract work.

sources.name: Second Talent — AI Engineer Rate Card Philippines

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev Philippines Data Scientist median ($3,684/month) + 15% AI/ML premium — estimated
us_employer_remote.source_note: No direct Arc.dev AI/ML Engineer Philippines figure available as of May 2026. Figure estimated from Arc.dev Philippines Data Scientist median ($3,684/month) with a 15% premium for AI/ML engineering scope. Percentage falls within Philippines specialized band (35–45% of US baseline). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Philippine mobile developers are active in the US app development market. Flutter and React Native experience is increasingly equivalent to native Swift/Kotlin in remote posting requirements.

us_employer_remote.source_name: Arc.dev — Remote Mobile Developer Salary in Philippines 2026

local_employer.caveats: Payscale Philippines (accessed May 2026) reports a local average of ₱593,218/year (approximately ₱49,435/month) for UX designers. International remote rates for Figma-proficient UX designers working on US product teams are typically 50–80% above local market.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 15-1255 — estimated at 27% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: No direct Arc.dev UI/UX Designer Philippines figure available as of May 2026. Estimated at 27% of BLS OES May 2024 median for UX Designers and UX Researchers (SOC 15-1255, $8,174/month), within the expected Philippines mid-level band (25–35%). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Glassdoor Manila (accessed May 2026) shows a median of ₱45,000/month for product managers at all levels across all employer types. International remote rates for senior PMs with documented track records in US markets are substantially higher.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 11-2021 — estimated at 28% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 28% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Marketing Managers (SOC 11-2021, $13,419/month), within the expected Philippines mid-level band (25–35%). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: PMP-certified project managers and CSM-certified Scrum Masters command a premium of 20–30% in the Philippine remote market. US-employer remote roles often require Asana, Monday.com, or JIRA proficiency.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 13-1082 — estimated at 26% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 26% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Project Management Specialists (SOC 13-1082, $8,396/month), within the expected Philippines mid-level band (25–35%). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: The Philippines has a well-established BPO sector; customer support compensation is influenced heavily by this market segment. US-facing roles with technical support responsibilities (L2/L3) command 40–60% premium above voice support.

sources.name: Indeed Philippines — Customer Support Specialist Salaries

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 43-4051 — estimated at 27% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 27% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Customer Service Representatives (SOC 43-4051, $3,570/month), within the expected Philippines non-technical band (25–35%). Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: SalaryExpert Philippines (accessed May 2026) reports a local medical billing and coding specialist average of ₱365,472/year (approximately ₱30,456/month). International remote rates for CPC- or CCS-certified billers serving US healthcare clients are typically 50–80% above local market.

sources.name: SalaryExpert — Medical Billing Specialist Salary Philippines

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 29-2072 — estimated at 26% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 26% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Medical Records Specialists (SOC 29-2072, $4,188/month). No direct public-source US employer remote figure for Philippine medical billing specialists available as of May 2026. CPC- or CCS-certified billers serving US healthcare clients may command the upper portion of the range. Treat as directional.

local_employer.caveats: Payscale Philippines (accessed May 2026) reports a local average of ₱442,126/year (approximately ₱36,844/month) for CAD drafters. SalaryExpert Philippines shows similar local market data. International remote rates for AutoCAD/Revit specialists serving US AEC firms reflect a premium for English-language documentation and US building code familiarity.

us_employer_remote.source_name: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 17-3011 — estimated at 27% of US median
us_employer_remote.source_note: Estimated at 27% of BLS OES May 2024 median for Architectural and Civil Drafters (SOC 17-3011, $5,738/month). No direct public-source US employer remote figure for Philippine CAD drafters available as of May 2026. AutoCAD/Revit specialists with US AEC firm experience command the upper range. Treat as directional.
